mutation: version + 2 instead of + 1
detection_mechanism: pre-step task snap check (before step 28; task.acquire response returns promise not task version)
notes: Caught 1 step after divergence. task.acquire response contains only promise+was_acquired so response diff check cannot fire; task version only visible in snap.

mutation: skip DELETE ready callbacks on re-acquire
detection_mechanism: pre-step task snap check (resumes field differs when stale ready callbacks remain)
notes: Caught at step 28 via task snap. Stale ready callbacks inflate resumes field, which is included in task record in snap.

mutation: remove version check (t.version = ?4 replaced with ?4 >= 0, always true)
detection_mechanism: MISSED — gen_task_heartbeat always sends current version, never stale
test_improvement: gen_task_heartbeat now sends version-1 (stale) 25% of the time; bug then caught at step 1984 via messages diverged on debug.tick
notes: Timeout extended for stale-version heartbeat in SQLite; Postgres correctly ignores it; task lease expires in Postgres but not SQLite; outgoing_execute differs when tick fires.

mutation: skip outgoing_execute insertion on release
detection_mechanism: per-step messages diverged check at step=23 op=task.release
notes: Caught in the same step the mutation fires. outgoing_execute is included in the messages snapshot so missing message is detected immediately.

mutation: wrong timeout_type on release: set 1 (lease) instead of 0 (retry)
detection_mechanism: pre-step tasks diverged check at step=24 op=task.halt
notes: Caught 1 step later. timeout_type is visible in the task record snapshot so mismatch detected on next pre-step check.

mutation: skip DELETE task_timeouts on fulfill
detection_mechanism: pre-step tasks diverged check at step=28 op=promise.register_callback
notes: Stale task_timeout for a fulfilled task changes the task record in the snapshot. Caught a few steps after fulfill fires.

mutation: skip DELETE callbacks where task is awaiter on fulfill
detection_mechanism: pre-step callbacks diverged check at step=1113 op=debug.tick
notes: Stale awaiter callbacks accumulate; eventually diverge from Postgres callbacks snapshot. Caught late (1113 steps) because callbacks only diverge when the awaited promise settles again with a different task as awaiter.

mutation: skip state transition to 'suspended' (task stays 'acquired')
detection_mechanism: pre-step tasks diverged check at step=11 op=promise.get
notes: Task state remains 'acquired' in SQLite while Postgres shows 'suspended'. Caught very quickly at next pre-step snap.

mutation: skip callback registration (task suspended but callbacks table untouched)
detection_mechanism: pre-step callbacks diverged check at step=11 op=promise.get
notes: Missing callbacks immediately visible in callbacks snapshot on the very next pre-step check.

mutation: version + 2 instead of + 1
detection_mechanism: pre-step tasks diverged check at step=27 op=task.fulfill
notes: Same class as mutation #1 on SQLite — symmetric result. task.acquire response contains only promise+was_acquired so response diff check cannot fire; version mismatch caught by next tasks snap.

mutation: skip outgoing_execute insertion on release (CTE removed)
detection_mechanism: per-step messages diverged check at step=23 op=task.release
notes: Symmetric to SQLite mutation #4. Missing outgoing_execute message caught immediately in same step.

mutation: relax process_id check: accept any acquired task regardless of owning PID (tt.process_id = $4 OR tt.process_id IS NOT NULL)
detection_mechanism: MISSED — generator only sends PID='diff-test-pid', so mutated condition is never exercised differently from correct one
test_improvement: (1) gen_task_heartbeat now sends 'wrong-pid' 15% of the time; (2) pre-step taskTimeouts check had wrong JSON key 'task_timeouts' instead of 'taskTimeouts' — fixed to camelCase; bug then caught at step=2430 via taskTimeouts diverged
notes: Two separate gaps: test coverage gap (no wrong-PID heartbeats) and instrumentation bug (wrong JSON key rendered the taskTimeouts check a no-op comparing [] to []).

mutation: flip state guard so task UPDATE is a no-op (state='fulfilled' instead of state!='fulfilled') — task never transitions to fulfilled
detection_mechanism: per-step messages diverged check at step=124 op=debug.tick
notes: Stale 'acquired' task (task never fulfilled) causes outgoing_execute divergence when tick fires next lease expiry.

mutation: skip task resume and outgoing_execute insertion (callbacks marked ready but task stays suspended forever)
detection_mechanism: per-step messages diverged check at step=16 op=debug.tick
notes: Suspended task never resumes; Postgres emits outgoing_execute for resumed task on debug.tick but SQLite does not. Caught immediately at next tick.

mutation: remove halted state guard — allow continue on any non-fulfilled, non-pending task (accepts acquired/suspended too)
detection_mechanism: per-step status mismatch at step=358 op=task.continue (sqlite=200, postgres=409)
notes: Postgres returns 409 Conflict when task is not halted; SQLite (mutated) returns 200. Caught immediately via response status check.

mutation: ignore state filter — return all tasks regardless of requested state
detection_mechanism: per-step data mismatch at step=73 op=task.search
notes: task.search response body differs immediately — extra tasks from other states appear in SQLite response. Caught in same step.

mutation: skip DELETE task_timeouts on fulfill (CTE replaced with no-op)
detection_mechanism: pre-step tasks diverged check at step=28 op=promise.register_callback
notes: Symmetric to SQLite mutation #6. Stale task_timeout for fulfilled task changes tasks snapshot.

mutation: skip lease expiry handling entirely (expired acquired tasks stay acquired, no outgoing_execute)
detection_mechanism: per-step messages diverged check at step=61 op=debug.tick
notes: Postgres correctly re-enqueues expired tasks and emits outgoing_execute on the tick; SQLite doesn't. Caught on the next debug.tick after a lease expires.

mutation: skip outgoing_unblock insertion (listeners deleted silently, no unblock message sent)
detection_mechanism: per-step messages diverged check at step=16 op=debug.tick
notes: Missing outgoing_unblock diverges messages snapshot on next debug.tick that processes a settled promise with registered listeners.

mutation: skip outgoing_unblock CTE in promise.settle path (listeners deleted but no unblock notification)
detection_mechanism: per-step messages diverged check at step=456 op=promise.settle
notes: Symmetric to SQLite mutation #19. Caught at step 456 because listeners must exist and promise must be settled before the effect is visible in messages snapshot.
